use_cases: Interactive hero section headline with sliding text reveal for landing pages
Dynamic slogan or tagline display with user-controlled progression
Creative portfolio showcases where users explore different text options
Product marketing pages with engaging text-based interactions
Onboarding or feature reveal sequences with slider-based storytelling
ai_summary: A dynamic text slider component that uses a range slider to progressively reveal text. It employs clever off-screen text measurement with ResizeObserver to ensure precise text clipping regardless of font loading or viewport changes. Features dark mode support, responsive typography (text-5xl to text-7xl), and smooth transitions for an engaging headline presentation on landing pages or hero sections.
